arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy names major challenge awaiting Ruben Amorim at Man Utd
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy names the major challenge awaiting Ruben Amorim as Man Utd manager before he starts work at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim drops major Man Utd transfer hint
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim drops a major transfer hint before he starts work as the new Man Utd manager.

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi makes feelings perfectly clear on Man Utd star Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: Manchester United might have had a difficult time over the last year and a half, but Alejandro Garnacho has clearly caught the eye of Argentina team-mate Lionel Messi

arts.ttl: Man Utd OPEN TALKS to sign Harry Maguire successor
arts.sum: Manchester United have opened talks to sign Bayer Leverkusen centre back Jonathan Tah . Fichajes report that United are in talks to sign Tah, where he would be a replacement for Harry Maguire.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Ruben Amorim coaching Manchester United against Leicester? When is his first game?
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy takes interim charge of Manchester United for the third and final time against Leicester City in the Premier League on Sunday, with Sporting CP’s Ruben Amorim to officially start his spell as head coach of the Red Devils on Monday (November 11 ). The Premier League giants announced they had reached a deal to hire the Portuguese on November 1, three days after Sporting made it known they had been approached by United, who had indicated their willingness to pay his €10 million ($10.72 million) release clause.

arts.ttl: Team News: Is Amad fit for the Red Devils? Man United XI vs. Leicester revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United attacker Amad Diallo overcomes a knock to be included in the Red Devils XI for Sunday's Premier League clash with Leicester City.

arts.ttl: Manchester United v Leicester, Nottingham Forest v Newcastle, and more: football – live
arts.sum: Premier League 2pm GMT kick-offs and much more Live scores | Share your thoughts with Yara via email Paul MacInnes with some big news that will certainly affect the Premier League. Proposed changes to the football regulator that would ensure clubs could not be sold to nation states are to be put before the House of Lords, as legislation returns to parliament this week. Nineteen changes to the football governance bill have been proposed by Fair Game, an organisation of 34 men’s clubs that argues for a more sustainable approach to running the national sport. Other proposals include the addition of a human rights component to owners’ and directors’ tests and a mandate to disclose the source of an owner’s funds. The text of the proposed amendment on state ownership says: “The Bill must exclude the possibility that an owner of a club could be a state or state-controlled person or entity. Forest have had the third-lowest possession in the league this season – but it works. Or at least, works for them. A club with a more heightened sense of self-worth might insist on having more of the ball, on something more sophisticated, but simplicity has its own charm. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Benjamin Sesko boost for Red Devils, Arsenal?
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal are allegedly handed a boost regarding a potential summer approach for RB Leipzig forward Benjamin Sesko.

arts.ttl: How to watch Man United vs Leicester - TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: Leicester City conclude their matches ahead of the final international break of the year as they travel to Manchester United on Sunday. The Man United vs Leicester City match is scheduled to kick off at 2pm on Sunday, November 10 at Old Trafford, alongside two other games taking place simultaneously.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Manchester United with Jamie Vardy and Ricardo Pereira missing
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Hermansen; Justin, Faes, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Winks, Soumare; Buonanotte, Ndidi, Fatawu; Ayew. Jamie Vardy and Ricardo Pereira are both missing from the Leicester City squad at Manchester United with Boubakary Soumare brought in as one of three changes.
